title: What to know about acne before using medicinal herbs
intro: Certain herbal teas, like chamomile and green tea, offer proven benefits in managing acne. Chamomile tea's anti-inflammatory properties reduce redness and swelling, while green tea's high antioxidant content and antibacterial properties combat acne-causing bacteria and decrease skin inflammation. Regular consumption of these herbal teas contributes to clearer, healthier skin.
definition: Acne is a common skin condition characterized by the emergence of pimples, blackheads, and whiteheads, primarily on the face, back, and chest. It occurs when hair follicles become clogged with oil and dead skin cells. Acne holds great significance in one's life due to its potential emotional and psychological consequences. Persistent acne can lead to reduced self-esteem, anxiety, and even depression, impacting one's overall quality of life. Therefore, addressing and managing acne is crucial for maintaining both physical and mental well-being.
